creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
As perrequest by phk, this is an addition to procfs to export process
resource limit information.

Fix: 

The patches are avaliable at http://www.freebsd.org/~adrian/procfs-rlimit/ .
There is a README file, and two diffs - one to src/sys, and one to the procfs
man page.
How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
